---
title: Inside the Crabrooms
---

## Project Overview

This repository contains materials for the **Inside the Crabrooms** project:

- Deryn Bagley
- Sophie Monterola
- Hannah Tucker

### Research Question

How do different crab traps affect the stress of native shore crabs?

### Materials

- Fabric mesh for “Fukui” trap
- Mud/silt
- Foil or blacked-out material for “crab slab”
- Rock or fake crab

### Data

Data sheet: <https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1VAlEyL2nJha_8owaYQv3jHhkOkzxcGFZl1xUTlPfGMs/edit?usp=sharing>

## Notes

This site has been simplified from the original Quarto manuscript template to a basic project website structure.
